home.heroDescription: Modern tire sales, balancing, alignment and mounting. Expert solutions for all passenger and commercial vehicles.

highlights.expertText: Trusted by thousands of drivers in Selçuklu for decades.
highlights.brandsText: Michelin, Bridgestone, Continental, Pirelli and more — in stock or quickly sourced.
highlights.fastText: Modern mounting equipment, same-day service with or without an appointment.

home.ctaTitle: Let's find the right tire for your car
home.ctaText: Share your plate or vehicle model — we'll send matching sizes and price options.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From tire sales to maintenance and repair — everything your vehicle needs in one place.

items.saleText: Summer, winter and all-season tires. Wide stock across premium and budget brands.
items.mountText: Modern mounting machines — fast change without damaging your wheels or tires.
items.balanceText: Precise balancing that prevents steering wheel vibration and extends tire life.
items.alignmentText: 3D alignment equipment to restore toe, camber and caster to factory spec.
items.repairText: No quick-fix sealants — proper internal cord patches for lasting repairs.
items.storageText: Seasonal storage with controlled humidity and temperature.
items.rimText: OEM and aftermarket steel and alloy wheel options.
items.fleetText: Bulk pricing and scheduled maintenance plans for company fleets.

brands.title: Brands We Carry
brands.subtitle: Long-standing partnerships with the world's leading tire manufacturers.
brands.note: Don't see a brand you need? Contact us — special orders welcome.

about.title: About Us
about.lead: Büyükyılmaz Oto Lastik is a long-established family business in Konya Selçuklu.
about.p1: Three generations in the tire and auto care industry, serving everything from passenger cars to heavy commercial vehicles.
about.p2: Honesty, quality and lasting customer relationships are at the center of our work. We treat every vehicle as our own and stay transparent — from the parts we use to the prices we quote.
about.p3: With modern equipment and certified technicians we deliver brand-independent, manufacturer-grade service quality.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: WhatsApp or phone is the fastest way to reach us. Directions are on the map below.
contact.messagePreset: Hi, I'd like a tire price quote for my car.

footer.tagline: Trusted tire shop in Konya Selçuklu
